productDisplayName: Nike Women Lunarfly Blue Sports Shoes
description: The nike LunarFly+ 2 running shoe is designed to offer a stable ride with plush cushioning. A take off on the LunarFly, this shoe offers an enhanced Fit and support with a bolder and more modern look. With absolute Lunarlon cushioning and a more robust heel counter than the LunarFly, this shoe works great for underpronators and mild overpronators, while its Dynamic Support function adapts to every stride the runner takes. UpperHeavily meshed upper with synthetic overlays for absolute breathable comfort and durabilityUpdated overlay on the midfoot for enhanced supportMeshed and padded tongue with a lace-up system for snug fit and comfortInner bootie that wraps around the foot offering breathable, snug comfortCushioned sockliner for in-step comfortSwoosh overlays on the sides for enhanced shoe structureReflective material on the toe and heel region for easy visibility in low light conditionsMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorptionLunarlon cushioning encased in a supportive foam carrier for unique, lightweight ultra-plush cushioning and springy responsive supportDynamic Support system that adapts to every stride you takeRobust heel counter for an improved fitOutsoleDurable mixed-rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs throughout for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for smooth flexibility and an efficient rideHell scoop for cushioned comfort and impact protectionnike+ Ready which makes it compatible with various Nike+ productsShoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
